summary: Iteration 3 testing: Rewards, Stars, Conflicts, Vision endpoints. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Kids tab renders perfectly with child selector, star hero, reward cards, and redemption flow. Camera modal integration missing from Feed screen - CameraCaptureModal component exists but not wired to camera button. All other features working correctly.

integration_issues.flow: Camera capture → Vision extraction → Prefilled AddCardModal
integration_issues.issue: CameraCaptureModal component exists and is properly implemented, but is NOT rendered in feed.tsx. Camera button (fab-camera) currently opens AddCardModal directly with source='CAMERA', skipping the vision extraction flow entirely.
integration_issues.expected_flow: Click fab-camera → CameraCaptureModal opens → User takes/selects photo → POST /api/vision/extract → AddCardModal opens with prefilled data
integration_issues.actual_flow: Click fab-camera → AddCardModal opens directly (no vision extraction)
integration_issues.fix_required: Add CameraCaptureModal to feed.tsx with showCamera state, wire onCamera to setShowCamera(true), and wire CameraCaptureModal's onDraft to open AddCardModal with vision-extracted data

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), TouchableWithoutFeedback deprecated (use Pressable), useNativeDriver not supported in web preview
react_native_issues.note: Same deprecation warnings as iteration 1. Do not affect functionality.

action_items: CRITICAL: Integrate CameraCaptureModal into feed.tsx - add showCamera state, render CameraCaptureModal component, wire camera button to open modal, wire modal's onDraft to trigger vision extraction and open AddCardModal with prefilled data
critical_code_review_comments: CameraCaptureModal component is well-implemented with proper testIDs (cam-close, cam-take, cam-library) and vision extraction logic, but it's not integrated into the Feed screen
The camera button in FloatingActionBar currently bypasses the entire vision extraction flow

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Kids tab fully functional, camera modal integration missing)

seed_data_creation: Re-seeded Emma to 75 stars and Liam to 40 stars before backend tests. After tests, Emma has 50 stars (redeemed 30-star reward during testing).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working perfectly. Kids tab is beautiful and fully functional. The only issue is CameraCaptureModal not integrated into Feed - the component exists and works, just needs to be wired up. Vision endpoint tested and working (requires auth, returns structured response or graceful error). Stars auto-award working correctly (5 stars per TASK completion by Child). Rewards redemption working with proper validation (400 if insufficient stars).

rewards_crud.create_reward: ✓ POST /api/rewards creates new reward with reward_id

reward_redemption.sufficient_stars: ✓ POST /api/rewards/{id}/redeem with Emma (75★) redeeming 30★ reward: deducts stars correctly, returns updated member
reward_redemption.insufficient_stars: ✓ POST /api/rewards/{id}/redeem with Liam (40★) trying to redeem 100★ reward: returns 400, stars unchanged

stars_auto_award.parent_task_done: ✓ POST card type=TASK assignee=Alex Chen, PATCH status=DONE → Alex Chen's stars unchanged

rca_of_issue.issue: CameraCaptureModal not integrated into Feed screen
rca_of_issue.root_cause: The CameraCaptureModal component was created and properly implemented with all required functionality (camera/library picker, vision extraction API call, testIDs), but the integration step into feed.tsx was missed. The camera button in FloatingActionBar was wired to open AddCardModal directly instead of CameraCaptureModal.
reproduction_steps: 3. Observe: AddCardModal opens directly with source='CAMERA'
4. Expected: CameraCaptureModal should open first, allow photo capture, perform vision extraction, then open AddCardModal with prefilled data
mitigation_steps: 1. Add showCamera state to feed.tsx: const [showCamera, setShowCamera] = useState(false)
2. Update FloatingActionBar onCamera prop to: onCamera={() => setShowCamera(true)}
3. Add CameraCaptureModal component to feed.tsx render (similar to VoiceCaptureModal pattern)
4. Wire CameraCaptureModal's onDraft to set voiceDraft, addSource='CAMERA', close camera modal, and open AddCardModal
5. Test full flow: camera button → modal opens → photo selection → vision extraction → AddCardModal with prefilled data
